resources.string: Lift and bodyweight reminders at random times
Tap to open the app and log your weight.
Tap to record a PR or training.

string-array.name: reminder_bw_aggressive_titles
string-array.item: Hey Fat***, hit the scale
Hey dumba***, wake up — weigh in
Hey lazy***, move it — scale time
Hey weak***, listen — weigh in
Hey soft***, scale time
Hey jacka***, get on the scale
Hey cupcake, log your numbers
Hey numb***, log your weight
Hey buttercup, stop skipping
Hey princess, bodyweight check

string-array.name: reminder_bw_aggressive_texts
string-array.item: Hey Fat***, step on the scale already.
Hey dumba***, your weight is not going to log itself.
Hey lazy***, open the app and stop ghosting the scale.
Hey weak***, bodyweight check — now.
Hey soft***, punch in your weight before I lose patience.
Hey jacka***, the scale misses you. Log it.
Hey cupcake, your weight will not log itself.
Hey numb***, still dodging the scale? Log your bodyweight.
Hey buttercup, open PRyx and punch in your weight.
Hey princess, the scale is waiting. Log your bodyweight.

string-array.name: reminder_lift_aggressive_titles
string-array.item: Hey Fat***, get under the bar
Hey dumba***, put the phone down
Hey lazy***, log your lift
Hey weak***, bar is calling
Hey soft***, go train
Hey jacka***, log a lift
Hey cupcake, gym time
Hey numb***, stop scrolling
Hey buttercup, under the bar
Hey princess, no excuses

string-array.name: reminder_lift_aggressive_texts
string-array.item: Hey Fat***, get under the bar and log a lift.
Hey dumba***, stop scrolling and log your training.
Hey lazy***, open the app and record a lift already.
Hey weak***, your PRs will not write themselves. Log one.
Hey soft***, gym called — it wants a logged lift.
Hey jacka***, time to work. Log a lift in PRyx.
Hey cupcake, put the phone down and log a lift.
Hey numb***, get under the bar and log something.
Hey buttercup, open PRyx and punch in a lift.
Hey princess, the bar is waiting. Log a lift.

resources.string: Aggressive notifications contain adult language. You must confirm that you are 18 or older to enable this mode.
